title: 「名詞比較句」句型
formula: Subject + verb + more / fewer + plural countable noun + than + comparison

formulas.formula: Subject + verb + more / fewer + plural countable noun + than + comparison
Subject + verb + more / less + uncountable noun + than + comparison
Subject + verb + far / much / slightly + more / fewer / less + noun + than + comparison

example: People today pay far more attention to science than to the arts.
exampleZh: 今天的人對科學的關注，遠遠多於對藝術的關注。

examples.en: People today pay far more attention to science than to the arts.
examples.zh: 今天的人對科學的關注，遠遠多於對藝術的關注。
examples.highlight: far more attention to science than to the arts

examples.en: The new machine produces fewer errors than the old one.
examples.zh: 新機器產生的錯誤比舊機器少。

examples.en: This phone uses less power than my old phone.
examples.zh: 這部電話使用的電力比我的舊電話少。

meaning.zh: 名詞比較句用來比較兩個人物、事物、活動、時段或情況在數量、份量或程度上的差別。

rules.zh: More 可配合可數及不可數名詞，表示第一項的數量或份量較多。
rules.en: Use more with countable or uncountable nouns when the first number or amount is greater.

rules.zh: Fewer 配合可數複數名詞。
rules.en: Use fewer with plural countable nouns.

rules.zh: 保持 than 前後結構平衡；重複介詞通常能令比較關係更清楚。
rules.en: Keep the structures before and after than parallel; repeating the preposition often makes the comparison clearer.

rules.zh: 使用 far、much、slightly、a little 等程度副詞表達差距大小。
rules.en: Use degree words such as far, much, slightly and a little to show the size of the difference.

rules.zh: 本練習每個答案都要使用 more / fewer / less + 名詞 + than，不要只使用 larger、smaller、higher 或 lower。
rules.en: Every answer in this exercise must use more / fewer / less + noun + than rather than only larger, smaller, higher or lower.

rules.zh: Than 用於比較；then 表示「然後」或某個時間。
rules.en: Than introduces a comparison; then refers to sequence or time.

benefits.zh: 準確指出哪一項的數量或份量較多或較少。
benefits.en: It clearly identifies which item has the greater or smaller quantity.

benefits.zh: 把兩項數量資料合併成一句清楚的比較句。
benefits.en: It combines two amounts into one clear comparison.

benefits.zh: 使用 far、much 和 slightly 等詞清楚表達差距大小。
benefits.en: It clearly expresses whether the difference is large or small.

benefits.zh: 適合描述調查結果、預算、時間表、環境數據和社會趨勢。
benefits.en: It is useful for describing data, trends and resource allocation.

benefits.zh: 準確指出正在比較的是關注、資助、時間或支援，使論點更具體。
benefits.en: It makes an argument more specific by naming the exact quantity being compared.

benefits.zh: 提供另一種組織資料的方法，避免反覆使用相同句式。
benefits.en: It provides another way to organise information and avoid repetitive patterns.

en: Rewrite each sentence using more, fewer or less + noun + than to make a noun comparison.
Keep any information showing whether the difference is large or small. Use words such as far, much or slightly when necessary.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 more、fewer 或 less + 名詞 + than 改寫以下句子，以作名詞比較。
保留題目中表示差距大小的意思。如有需要，使用 far、much 或 slightly。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia bought several notebooks but only a small number of folders.
questions.promptZh: 米婭買了幾本筆記簿，但只買了少量文件夾。
questions.answer: Mia bought more notebooks than folders.
questions.answerZh: 米婭買的筆記簿比文件夾多。
questions.highlight: Mia bought more notebooks than folders.

questions.prompt: Sandwiches made up most of what Ben ate, while biscuits formed a smaller part.
questions.promptZh: 本吃的食物主要是三文治，餅乾只佔較小部分。
questions.answer: Ben ate fewer biscuits than sandwiches.
questions.answerZh: 本吃的餅乾比三文治少。
questions.highlight: Ben ate fewer biscuits than sandwiches.

questions.prompt: We used a larger amount of flour and a smaller amount of sugar.
questions.promptZh: 我們使用了較多麵粉和較少糖。
questions.answer: We used less sugar than flour.
questions.answerZh: 我們用的糖比麵粉少。
questions.highlight: We used less sugar than flour.

questions.prompt: Inside the blue bag, apples are more numerous than oranges.
questions.promptZh: 在藍色袋中，蘋果的數量多於橙。
questions.answer: The blue bag contains more apples than oranges.
questions.answerZh: 藍色袋中的蘋果比橙多。
questions.highlight: The blue bag contains more apples than oranges.

questions.prompt: Homework took most of Leo’s available time, while games took a smaller share.
questions.promptZh: 功課佔用了里奧大部分可用時間，遊戲只佔較小部分。
questions.answer: Leo spent less time on games than on homework.
questions.answerZh: 里奧花在遊戲上的時間比功課少。
questions.highlight: Leo spent less time on games than on homework.

questions.prompt: Girls form the larger group in our class, while boys form the smaller group.
questions.promptZh: 我們班的女生是人數較多的一組，男生則是人數較少的一組。
questions.answer: Our class has more girls than boys.
questions.answerZh: 我們班的女生比男生多。
questions.highlight: Our class has more girls than boys.

questions.prompt: Sara drank mainly water and only a small amount of juice.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉主要喝水，只喝了少量果汁。
questions.answer: Sara drank more water than juice.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉喝的水比果汁多。
questions.highlight: Sara drank more water than juice.

questions.prompt: The shop sold a large number of T-shirts but only a small number of hats.
questions.promptZh: 商店售出了大量 T 恤，但只售出少量帽子。
questions.answer: The shop sold fewer hats than T-shirts.
questions.answerZh: 商店售出的帽子比 T 恤少。
questions.highlight: The shop sold fewer hats than T-shirts.

questions.prompt: I receive a smaller amount of help with reading, while my writing support is greater.
questions.promptZh: 我在閱讀方面得到較少協助，在寫作方面得到的支援則較多。
questions.answer: I receive less help with reading than with writing.
questions.answerZh: 我在閱讀方面得到的協助比寫作少。
questions.highlight: I receive less help with reading than with writing.

questions.prompt: Roses outnumber tulips in the garden.
questions.promptZh: 花園裏玫瑰的數量多於鬱金香。
questions.answer: The garden has more roses than tulips.
questions.answerZh: 花園裏的玫瑰比鬱金香多。
questions.highlight: The garden has more roses than tulips.

questions.prompt: The library’s novel collection is larger than its dictionary collection.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館的小說藏量比字典藏量大。
questions.answer: The library owns more novels than dictionaries.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館擁有的小說比字典多。
questions.highlight: The library owns more novels than dictionaries.

questions.prompt: Daniel’s grammar mistakes were more numerous than his spelling mistakes.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾的文法錯誤數量多於串字錯誤。
questions.answer: Daniel made fewer spelling mistakes than grammar mistakes.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾犯的串字錯誤比文法錯誤少。
questions.highlight: Daniel made fewer spelling mistakes than grammar mistakes.

questions.prompt: Food takes a larger share of my brother’s monthly budget than clothes.
questions.promptZh: 食物佔我哥哥每月預算的比例比衣服大。
questions.answer: My brother spends less money on clothes than on food.

questions.highlight: My brother spends less money on clothes than on food.

questions.prompt: Passenger numbers are higher on the morning train than on the evening train.

questions.prompt: This phone needs a smaller amount of power than my old phone.
questions.promptZh: 這部手機所需的電力比我的舊手機少。
questions.answer: This phone uses less power than my old phone.
questions.answerZh: 這部手機使用的電力比我的舊手機少。
questions.highlight: This phone uses less power than my old phone.

questions.prompt: The school’s application total is higher this year than it was last year.
questions.promptZh: 學校今年收到的申請總數高於去年。
questions.answer: The school has received more applications this year than last year.

questions.prompt: The number of rainy days in June was lower than the number in May.
questions.promptZh: 六月的下雨天數少於五月。

questions.prompt: Chloe focuses more strongly on pronunciation than on speed.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊對發音的重視程度高於速度。
questions.answer: Chloe pays more attention to pronunciation than to speed.

questions.prompt: The amount of natural light in the small room is lower than in the large room.
questions.promptZh: 小房間的自然光量低於大房間。
questions.answer: The small room has less natural light than the large room.

questions.prompt: The team’s task total was higher before lunch than after lunch.
questions.promptZh: 團隊在午飯前完成的工作總數高於午飯後。

questions.prompt: Buses greatly outnumber trams in the city.
questions.promptZh: 這個城市的巴士數量遠遠多於電車。
questions.answer: The city has far more buses than trams.

questions.highlight: The city has far more buses than trams.

questions.prompt: Grace’s first report contained only a small fraction of the information in her second report.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲第一份報告所包含的資料，只佔第二份報告的一小部分。
questions.answer: Grace included much less information in her first report than in her second.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲第一份報告所包含的資料遠少於第二份。

questions.prompt: The new machine’s error total is dramatically lower than that of the old one.
questions.promptZh: 新機器的錯誤總數遠低於舊機器。
questions.answer: The new machine produces far fewer errors than the old one.

questions.prompt: The amount of speaking practice in this course is only slightly greater than the amount of writing practice.
questions.promptZh: 這個課程的口語練習量只比寫作練習量略多。

questions.prompt: Local patients form a larger group at the hospital than overseas patients.

questions.prompt: The number of paper forms processed by our office is lower than the number of online forms.

questions.prompt: Science receives much greater attention from people today than the arts do.

questions.answer: People today pay far more attention to science than to the arts.

questions.highlight: People today pay far more attention to science than to the arts.

questions.prompt: Pollution levels from public transport are lower than those from private cars.

questions.promptZh: 研究團隊在兩個年齡組別之間發現的差異數量，少於兩個收入組別之間的差異數量。

questions.promptZh: 吸引新顧客在公司預算中所佔的份額，比挽留現有顧客大。

questions.prompt: At the hospital, new nurses receive a greater amount of training than experienced nurses.
questions.promptZh: 在醫院，新護士得到的培訓量比有經驗的護士多。
questions.answer: The hospital gives more training to new nurses than to experienced nurses.

questions.prompt: Although the city has improved its public services, support for mental health remains far lower than support for physical health.
questions.promptZh: 雖然城市已改善公共服務，但對精神健康的支援仍遠低於對身體健康的支援。
questions.answer: Although the city has improved its public services, it still provides far less support for mental health than for physical health.
questions.answerZh: 雖然城市已改善公共服務，但對精神健康提供的支援仍遠少於對身體健康的支援。
questions.highlight: Although the city has improved its public services, it still provides far less support for mental health than for physical health.
